title: lindsaea angustipinna
intro: Lindsaea angustipinna is a species of fern, a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Lindsaeaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lindsaea angustipinna include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of Lindsaea angustipinna typically involve making a tea from the plant's leaves or using it in a decoction to extract its medicinal compounds.
